name: ExtensionEvidence_Name
title: R5: Name for this summary (machine friendly) (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Evidence.name` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Evidence.name` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Evidence.name` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Evidence.name` has a context of Evidence based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Evidence`.
Element `Evidence.name` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Name for this summary (machine friendly) (new)
element.comment:
Element `Evidence.name` has a context of Evidence based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Evidence`.
Element `Evidence.name` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
The name is not expected to be globally unique. The name should be a simple alphanumeric type name to ensure that it is machine-processing friendly.

element.definition: A natural language name identifying the evidence. This name should be usable as an identifier for the module by machine processing applications such as code generation.
element.comment: The name is not expected to be globally unique. The name should be a simple alphanumeric type name to ensure that it is machine-processing friendly.
